# GitHub Repository Optimization

## Recommended Repository Topics

Add the following topics to this repository via **Settings → Topics** on GitHub to improve discoverability:

```
llm
ai
llm-comparison
code-generation
video-generator
benchmark
openai
claude
gemini
ollama
desktop-app
electron
open-source
ai-tools
coding-assistant
llm-benchmark
ai-video
screen-recorder
```

## Recommended Repository Description

> Generate side-by-side LLM coding battle videos with your own API keys — free, local, open source.

## Recommended Website URL

> https://www.kaying.studio/open-arena-studio

---

> **Note:** Topics and description must be set manually in the GitHub repository settings or via the GitHub API. This file serves as a reference for the maintainer.
